title: The Luzz Inferno, According to 22 Reviewers
description: A synthesis of 22 video reviews of the Luzz Pro IV Inferno pickleball paddle, anchored on Johnkew Pickleball's measured data. Covers specs, price, the Boomstick comparison, the break-in dispute, durability flags, and who should actually buy it — with sponsored reviews counted and flagged.
